title: aspidium hirtum
intro: Aspidium hirtum, also known as the hirsute spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aspidium hirtum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
